data.body: CHECKPOINT: Documentation updates complete. (1) CLAUDE.md: Added 'Usage-aware throttling' paragraph after 'Conflict avoidance' block — describes check-usage.sh exit-code protocol, _compute_max_agents() 3-tier logic (unlimited/throttled/paused), and _check_rate_limit_error() fallback. (2) workflow-config-schema.json: Added orchestration section with max_agents property (type: integer|null, default: null). Acceptance criteria verified: grep -q 'check-usage.sh' CLAUDE.md → PASS; grep -q 'max_agents' plugins/dso/docs/workflow-config-schema.json → PASS; 3-tier protocol check → PASS. Not committed per task instructions.
